name: Pollard's Rho Factorization
description: Factor a composite number using Pollard's rho algorithm and Floyd's cycle detection.
intuition: Apply f(x) = x^2 + 1 mod n iteratively. Two pointers (tortoise/hare) detect a cycle. gcd(|x-y|, n) gives a non-trivial factor when the cycle is found in a factor's residues.
